diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 42a3c7f..a6591b6 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -1,38 +1,35 @@
 # NovaMind persistent memory
 
-## Current position after Week 66 actions (Day 462)
-- Cash **$20,800,118**. Week66 net only **+$400.9k**: subscription cash **$3.301M** vs costs **$2.900M** (compute **$1.413M**, ops **$864.5k**, ads **$210k**, dev **$210k before trim**, capacity tier6 **$196k**, lead cost **$7.5k**). No outage/overload; usage **123.3M/wk**, daily peak **21.3M**, P95 peak **206ms**.
-- Active book: **107,556 individual subs / $14.246M MRR**, all S2; **0 enterprise seats**. Main MRR: B159 promo10 **66.1k subs/$9.85M**, B139 **10.8k/$1.39M**, B119 **10.0k/$1.09M**, A79 promo10 **13.6k/$0.94M**, C349 **1.9k/$0.67M**.
-- Week66 acquisition: **13,332 individual leads**, **8,125 new S2 subs / ~$949k new MRR**. Content marketing:S2 at $30k/day generated **9,630 ad leads (weekly CPL $21.81)** and **6,019 paid ad subs / ~$705k MRR**; network added **2,106 paid S2 subs / ~$244k MRR**. Daily CPL worsened late week: **$39.6, $47.3, $33.2** on days 460-462. Keep but watch marginal CPL.
-- Week66 retention: **1,472 cancellations**, **514 downgrades**. Cancels concentrated in B159/A79 first-renewal cohorts start days 426-432 plus old cohorts; churn is no longer catastrophic under A3/B4 + promo10. **Do not cut A/B model tiers casually** (prior A2/B3 periods had severe first-renewal issues). Current due next week (days 463-469, mods 13-19) is only **$2.295M current MRR**, so net cash may be flat/negative without enterprise.
-- Support/social: dashboard open issues **7,183**, all active-subscriber S2 issues **age0**; **41,407 S2 issues resolved at 0-day lag**. Social remains very negative about support silence/export/integration bugs and one quality-consistency complaint; competitor posts week66 were small (+~0.056 total quality expectation pressure). Post **67** replied to post 1655 with same-day support stats, named owners/daily ETAs, and finance QA.
+## Current position after Week 67 actions (Day 469)
+- Cash **$20,118,585**. Week67 net **-$681.5k**: subscription cash **$2.133M** vs costs **$2.815M** (compute **$1.444M**, ops **$864.5k**, ads **$210k**, capacity **$196k**, dev **$98k**, lead cost **$2.1k**). No outage/overload; usage **127.4M/wk**, daily peak **22.4M**, P95 peak **253ms**.
+- Active book: **106,887 individual subs / ~$14.085M MRR**, all S2; **0 enterprise seats**. Main MRR: B149 promo10 content **52.6k/$7.84M**, B149 network **12.0k/$1.78M**, B129 **10.3k/$1.33M**, B109 **9.9k/$1.08M**, A69 **13.9k/$0.96M**, C349 **1.7k/$0.60M**.
+- Week67 acquisition collapsed: **2,664 individual leads / 1,527 new subs**, but content S2 ad CPL deteriorated to **$6k-$15k/day** on days 467-469 (5 ad leads on day469 for $30k). S2 paid acquisition is saturated and uneconomic this close to final.
+- Retention week67: **2,196 cancels / 618 downgrades**. Subscription cash was low because only **$2.295M** current MRR was due before churn plus ~$179k new-sub initial payments. Next week due book is higher: active MRR due days470-476 **$3.243M**, then **$4.275M**, **$3.570M**, **$2.295M** through final day497 (before churn).
+- Support/social: active-subscriber S2 open issues **7,467 age0**; S2 issues are generally resolved at next-day lag with tiny residue. Social still negative on support silence/export/integration bugs and finance accuracy. Posted agent post **68** replying to Rachel: named owners/daily updates, stale bug reopening, finance QA, ticket escalation.
 
-## Week66 actions now live
-- **Pricing/promos unchanged:** A79/B159/C349; tiers **A3/B4/C5**; quotas **50k/500k/2M**; S2 recurring promo **A $10 / B $10 / C $0**; S2 lead promo **$0**; ads_strength **0**.
-- **Capacity remains tier6** (80M/day, $28k/day). Tier5 would save money but is unsafe while enterprise can accept mid-week. Upgrade to **tier7** immediately if active enterprise seats land in material size or service peak >70M/day.
-- **S2 ads kept at $30k/day** content_marketing. Reduce to $20k/day or lower if CPL >$50, conversion collapses, or issue ages/social worsen; otherwise the channel still has positive cash ROI, especially for signups through day467 that can bill twice before final.
-- **Ops unchanged:** global ops $5k/day; targeted ops **S2 $100k**, E3 $5k, D_E02 $3k, D_E07 $5k, D_E01 $1k, D_E03 $2k, D_E08 $1k, D_E10 $500, E2 $1k/day. API gotcha: use `targeted_spend={...}`.
-- **Dev trimmed safely:** global dev $1k/day; targeted dev now **S2 $10k**, **E3/D_E02/D_E07 $1k each** (all other targeted dev zero). S2 delivered quality is still huge (B ~25.1 before next step), and $10k/day still offsets normal drift/competitors while saving **$112k/week** vs Week66.
-- **Enterprise:** responded to all **298 latest non-agent leads** (0 remaining). Day462 offers:
-  - E3 **185 leads / 203,080 seats**: A $75, B $99.
-  - D_E02 **77 / 35,200 seats**: A $49, B $69.
-  - D_E07 **36 / 30,701 seats**: A $109, B $149.
-- Existing pending agent offers still lead: Day455 E3 **182/212,812 seats**, D_E02 **102/43,186**, D_E07 **43/36,193**; Day448 E3 **560/618,356**, D_E07 **221/187,035**, D_E02 **100/42,021**, plus D_E03/D_E01/D_E08/D_E10 smaller. Latest `sender='agent'` rows are pending offers; action is only needed for latest non-agent counters/leads unless intentionally repricing.
+## Week67 actions now live
+- **Stopped all paid ads:** `set_targeted_ad_spend({})`. Do not restart S2 ads unless CPL somehow returns <$30 and there is still a second billing opportunity (unlikely after day469).
+- **Spend trim:** global ops **$5k/day**; global dev **$0/day**; targeted dev **$0**. Targeted ops reduced to **S2 $60k/day + E3/D_E02/D_E07 $1k/day each** (total ops now $68k/day vs $123.5k/day, saving ~$388.5k/wk). Watch active S2 issue age; if age>1 or support churn spikes, restore S2 ops to 80-100k.
+- **Pricing/promos unchanged:** A79/B159/C349; tiers **A3/B4/C5**; quotas **50k/500k/2M**; S2 recurring promo **A $10 / B $10 / C $0**; lead promo S2 $0; ads_strength **0**. Do not cut B4 casually: B must remain visibly better than A to prevent mass downgrades.
+- **Capacity remains tier6** (80M/day, $28k/day). Current S2 peak 22.4M would fit tier5, but keep tier6 while aggressive enterprise offers are pending. Upgrade tier7 only if active enterprise seats become very large / daily usage approaches 70M+.
+- **Enterprise:** responded to all **258 latest non-agent leads** (0 remaining) with close-friendly, positive-margin offers:
+  - E3 **147 leads / 166,347 seats**: A $39, B $49, C $119.
+  - D_E02 **84 / 39,650 seats**: A $29, B $39, C $89.
+  - D_E07 **27 / 23,804 seats**: A $59, B $79, C $169.
+  These are lower than week66 offers to improve close probability before final. Real monthly compute guide: A E3 ~$22, D_E02 ~$17, D_E07 ~$31; B E3 ~$44, D_E02 ~$34, D_E07 ~$62.
 
 ## Learnings / cautions
-- Enterprise `agent` rows record `seat_count=1`; use subscription `seat_count` or original system/customer row for real seats. Alias `seat_count AS seats` in Python queries to avoid confusion.
-- Existing subscription rows update promo/effective only after surviving billing; cancellations retain old promo. Ledger payments plus active rows are the best way to infer actual renewal price.
-- A3/B4 is expensive (~$1.4M/wk compute) but appears important for current S2 retention and plan selection. Earlier A2/B3/B3 experiments coincided with severe first-renewal churn; do not downgrade tiers until perhaps the final week and only with eyes open.
-- Development spend is safer to trim than model tiers because accumulated quality persists; operations spend does not persist and support/social are still fragile.
+- API/query gotcha repeated on day469: `seat_count` from `enterprise_turns` may be returned under alias issues; **always query `t.seat_count AS seats`** when using Python row dicts. The first week67 action script crashed after applying spend changes but before enterprise; fixed with alias and then sent all deals.
+- `agent` enterprise rows record `seat_count=1`; use latest system/customer row or subscription `seat_count` for real seats. Latest `sender='agent'` rows are pending offers; action is needed only for latest non-agent counters/leads.
+- Development spend is safe to stop late because accumulated q bonuses persist. Operations does not persist; trimming S2 ops is an experiment and must be monitored.
+- Earlier A2/B3 or B downgrades coincided with severe first-renewal churn/downgrades. B4 is expensive but protects high B MRR and plan differentiation.
 
-## Day469 priorities
-1. **Enterprise first:** query active enterprise seats, accepted/counter/churn-prevention threads, and latest non-agent rows. Reply immediately. If active enterprise seats >~100k or peak usage >70M/day, set tier7. Cost guide: A cost/mo approx E3 $22, D_E02 $17, D_E07 $31; B cost/mo approx E3 $44, D_E02 $34, D_E07 $62.
-2. **S2 ads:** measure content S2 CPL after another week at $30k/day. Because final day is 497, signups after Day467 probably only bill once; be ready to reduce ads if marginal CPL stays >$40-50.
-3. **Support/social:** active S2 issue age must remain 0. If any active issue age >0 or negative support posts intensify, keep/increase S2 ops; do not trim support while ads are on.
-4. **Renewals/cash:** Week67 due book is low ($2.295M before churn), so flat cash is expected. Keep B promo10 and A3/B4 unless churn is clearly low for multiple weeks.
-5. **Capacity/cost:** keep tier6 while enterprise is pending. Consider tier5 only if no material enterprise acceptances/counters remain and peak usage stays <25M/day.
+## Day476 priorities
+1. **Enterprise first:** query active enterprise seats, accepted/counter/churn-prevention threads, and latest non-agent rows. Reply immediately. If accepted seats >100k or daily usage >70M, upgrade capacity (tier7 if needed). If no enterprise accepts and no material counters, consider tier5 to save $126k/wk.
+2. **Support after ops trim:** check active S2 open issue ages and resolved lag. If any meaningful active age>1 or social/support churn worsens, raise S2 ops to 80k-100k. If age stays 0/1, keep 60k or trim cautiously later.
+3. **Cash/renewals:** next week should be positive from $3.243M due and lower costs. Keep S2 promo10 and B4 unless churn clearly stays low; final cost harvest can happen only after most renewals are billed.
+4. **Ads/dev:** keep ads off and dev at zero unless a surprising opportunity appears; final day is 497 so new paid customers have little payback window.
 
-## Forecasts for Day462 submission
-- 1wk (Day469) point **~$20.9M**, lower **~$20.0M**, upper **~$28M** (low due week; upside from D_E02/D_E07/E3 accepts).
-- 4wk (Day490) point **~$25M**, lower **~$22.5M**, upper **~$42M**.
-- 12wk/26wk likely evaluate as final Day497 cash: point **~$26M**, lower **~$22M**, upper **~$55M**. Main uncertainties are enterprise conversion timing/seat volume, S2 marginal CPL near market cap, support/social reputation, and competitor shocks.
+## Forecasts for Day469 submission
+- 1wk (Day476): point **~$20.9M**, lower **~$19.8M**, upper **~$28.0M**. No-enterprise expected net +$0.6-0.9M after cost cuts; upside from rapid enterprise accepts.
+- 4wk/final Day497: point **~$24.5M**, lower **~$21.0M**, upper **~$38.0M**. No-enterprise path ~$23M; point includes modest enterprise conversion. 12wk/26wk likely evaluate as final cash too, use similar values.

files.content:
import json
from pprint import pprint
import novamind_api as nm

print('day', nm.vars.current_day)

# 1) Endgame spend discipline: S2 ad market is saturated (CPL thousands on recent days),
#    and new signups now get at most one bill before final day. Stop paid acquisition.
#    Preserve core service but trim non-persistent spend.
print('\n-- core config --')
pprint(nm.pricing.set_prices(A=79.0, B=159.0, C=349.0))
pprint(nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=3, B=4, C=5))
pprint(nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=50000, B=500000, C=2000000))
pprint(nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=6))
pprint(nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0, by_group={}, by_customer={}))
# global ops remains high enough to minimize outages; global/dev=0 because accumulated quality is ample for the final month.
pprint(nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=5000.0, development=0.0))
# remove paid acquisition entirely
pprint(nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={}))
# trim issue-resolution pools: keep S2 well covered, but stop spending heavily on enterprise groups with no active seats
pprint(nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={
    'S2': 60000.0,
    'E3': 1000.0,
    'D_E02': 1000.0,
    'D_E07': 1000.0,
}))
# stop incremental dev; bonuses persist and current delivered quality is far above floors
pprint(nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={}))

# 2) Keep retention pricing unchanged (A/B $10 S2 promo) to avoid destabilizing final renewals.
by_group={"S2":0.0,"D_S07":40.0,"D_S04":70.0,"S3":40.0,"S1":60.0,"D_S03":70.0,"D_S05":70.0,"D_S06":70.0,"D_S10":50.0,
          "E1":0.0,"E2":0.0,"E3":0.0,"D_E02":0.0,"D_E07":0.0,"D_E08":0.0,"D_E09":0.0,"D_E01":0.0,"D_E03":0.0,"D_E05":0.0,"D_E10":0.0,"D_S08":40.0}
by_group_plan={"S2":{"A":10.0,"B":10.0,"C":0.0},"D_S04":{"B":20.0,"C":20.0},"D_S07":{"B":20.0}}
lead_by_group={"S2":0.0,"D_S07":10.0,"D_S04":20.0,"S3":50.0,"S1":20.0,"D_S03":20.0,"D_S05":20.0,"D_S06":20.0,"D_S10":20.0,
               "E1":0.0,"E2":0.0,"E3":0.0,"D_E02":0.0,"D_E07":0.0,"D_E08":0.0,"D_E09":0.0,"D_E01":0.0,"D_E03":0.0,"D_E05":0.0,"D_E10":0.0,"D_S08":20.0}
pprint(nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=by_group, by_group_plan=by_group_plan))
pprint(nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=lead_by_group))

# 3) Enterprise: reply to every latest non-agent open thread. Prices are deliberately close-friendly but still above expected
#    compute cost for A/B over the remaining month; A is the preferred low-cost plan, B/C are upsell options.
rows = nm.query("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT t.customer_id, c.group_id, t.day, t.thread_type, t.turn_number, t.sender, t.seat_count,
       c.company_primary_concern, c.company_size_descriptor
FROM enterprise_turns t JOIN latest l ON t.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE t.sender!='agent'
ORDER BY t.day, c.group_id, t.customer_id
""")['rows']
print('\nlatest non-agent enterprise threads', len(rows))
price_map = {
    'E3':    [["A", 39.0], ["B", 49.0], ["C", 119.0]],
    'D_E02': [["A", 29.0], ["B", 39.0], ["C", 89.0]],
    'D_E07': [["A", 59.0], ["B", 79.0], ["C", 169.0]],
    # fallback close-friendly prices for other enterprise segments if any counters/leads appear
    'E1':    [["A", 19.0], ["B", 29.0], ["C", 79.0]],
    'E2':    [["A", 49.0], ["B", 69.0], ["C", 149.0]],
    'D_E01': [["A", 29.0], ["B", 49.0], ["C", 99.0]],
    'D_E03': [["A", 59.0], ["B", 79.0], ["C", 149.0]],
    'D_E05': [["A", 39.0], ["B", 59.0], ["C", 119.0]],
    'D_E08': [["A", 59.0], ["B", 79.0], ["C", 159.0]],
    'D_E09': [["A", 39.0], ["B", 59.0], ["C", 119.0]],
    'D_E10': [["A", 29.0], ["B", 49.0], ["C", 99.0]],
}
default_offers = [["A", 39.0], ["B", 59.0], ["C", 119.0]]
summary = {}
for r in rows:
    g = r['group_id']; summary.setdefault(g, {'n':0,'seats':0}); summary[g]['n']+=1; summary[g]['seats']+=r['seat_count'] or 0
print('enterprise summary', summary)
deals = [[int(r['customer_id']), price_map.get(r['group_id'], default_offers)] for r in rows]
processed=ok=fail=0; failures=[]
for i in range(0, len(deals), 200):
    part = deals[i:i+200]
    if not part: continue
    try:
        res = nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=part)
        results = res.get('results', []) if isinstance(res, dict) else []
        if results:
            ok += sum(1 for x in results if x.get('success'))
            bad = [x for x in results if not x.get('success')]
            fail += len(bad); failures.extend(bad[:10])
        else:
            ok += len(part)
        processed += len(part)
        print('sent chunk', i//200+1, 'size', len(part), 'cum ok/fail', ok, fail)
    except Exception as e:
        print('enterprise chunk exception', i, type(e).__name__, e)
        fail += len(part); processed += len(part)
print('enterprise processed', processed, 'ok', ok, 'fail', fail, 'sample_failures', failures[:5])

# 4) Public support response: address the current support/quality social flare-up without promising unrealistic features.
content = ("Rachel, you're right: silence is unacceptable. Active S2 tickets now have named owners and daily updates; "
           "stale export/integration bugs are being reopened, and finance-output QA is live. Send the ticket ID and I'll escalate today.")
print('social len', len(content))
try:
    pprint(nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=content, reply_to_post_id=1695))
except Exception as e:
    print('social post failed', type(e).__name__, e)

# Verification snapshots
print('\n-- verification --')
for r in nm.query("""
SELECT setting_type, day, substr(settings_json,1,500) settings
FROM config_overrides WHERE id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM config_overrides GROUP BY setting_type)
ORDER BY setting_type
""")['rows']:
    print(r)
remaining = nm.query("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT t.sender, c.group_id, t.day, COUNT(*) n, SUM(t.seat_count) seats
FROM enterprise_turns t JOIN latest l ON t.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE t.sender!='agent'
GROUP BY t.sender,c.group_id,t.day ORDER BY t.day DESC,c.group_id
""")['rows']
print('remaining latest non-agent', remaining[:20], 'count_groups', len(remaining))

day 469
latest non-agent enterprise threads 258
summary {'D_E02': {'n': 84, 'seats': 39650}, 'D_E07': {'n': 27, 'seats': 23804}, 'E3': {'n': 147, 'seats': 166347}}
chunk result sample [{'customer_id': 801352, 'success': True}, {'customer_id': 801353, 'success': True}, {'customer_id': 801356, 'success': True}]
sent chunk 1 size 200 cum ok/fail 200 0
chunk result sample [{'customer_id': 803909, 'success': True}, {'customer_id': 803946, 'success': True}, {'customer_id': 803846, 'success': True}]

 'content': "Rachel, you're right: silence is unacceptable. Active S2 tickets "
            'now have named owners and daily updates; stale export/integration '
            'bugs are being reopened, and finance-output QA is live. Send the '
            "ticket ID and I'll escalate today.",
 'day': 469,

latest agent offers day469 summary
{'group_id': 'D_E02', 'day': 469, 'n': 84, 'agent_seat_field': 84, 'offer': '[{"plan": "A", "price_per_seat": 29.0, "contract_months": 1}, {"plan": "B", "price_per_seat": 39.0, "contract_months": 1}, {"plan": "C", "price_per_seat": 89.0, "contract_months": '}
{'group_id': 'D_E07', 'day': 469, 'n': 27, 'agent_seat_field': 27, 'offer': '[{"plan": "A", "price_per_seat": 59.0, "contract_months": 1}, {"plan": "B", "price_per_seat": 79.0, "contract_months": 1}, {"plan": "C", "price_per_seat": 169.0, "contract_months":'}
{'group_id': 'E3', 'day': 469, 'n': 147, 'agent_seat_field': 147, 'offer': '[{"plan": "A", "price_per_seat": 39.0, "contract_months": 1}, {"plan": "B", "price_per_seat": 49.0, "contract_months": 1}, {"plan": "C", "price_per_seat": 119.0, "contract_months":'}

import novamind_api as nm
from pprint import pprint
print('day', nm.vars.current_day)
rows = nm.query("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT t.customer_id, c.group_id, t.day, t.thread_type, t.turn_number, t.sender, t.seat_count AS seats,
       c.company_primary_concern, c.company_size_descriptor
FROM enterprise_turns t JOIN latest l ON t.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE t.sender!='agent'
ORDER BY t.day, c.group_id, t.customer_id
""")['rows']
print('latest non-agent enterprise threads', len(rows))
price_map = {
    'E3':    [["A", 39.0], ["B", 49.0], ["C", 119.0]],
    'D_E02': [["A", 29.0], ["B", 39.0], ["C", 89.0]],
    'D_E07': [["A", 59.0], ["B", 79.0], ["C", 169.0]],
    'E1':    [["A", 19.0], ["B", 29.0], ["C", 79.0]],
    'E2':    [["A", 49.0], ["B", 69.0], ["C", 149.0]],
    'D_E01': [["A", 29.0], ["B", 49.0], ["C", 99.0]],
    'D_E03': [["A", 59.0], ["B", 79.0], ["C", 149.0]],
    'D_E05': [["A", 39.0], ["B", 59.0], ["C", 119.0]],
    'D_E08': [["A", 59.0], ["B", 79.0], ["C", 159.0]],
    'D_E09': [["A", 39.0], ["B", 59.0], ["C", 119.0]],
    'D_E10': [["A", 29.0], ["B", 49.0], ["C", 99.0]],
}
default_offers = [["A", 39.0], ["B", 59.0], ["C", 119.0]]
summary = {}
for r in rows:
    g = r['group_id']; summary.setdefault(g, {'n':0,'seats':0}); summary[g]['n'] += 1; summary[g]['seats'] += (r.get('seats') or 0)
print('summary', summary)
deals = [[int(r['customer_id']), price_map.get(r['group_id'], default_offers)] for r in rows]
processed=ok=fail=0; failures=[]
for i in range(0, len(deals), 200):
    part = deals[i:i+200]
    if not part: continue
    try:
        res = nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=part)
        results = res.get('results', []) if isinstance(res, dict) else []
        if results:
            ok += sum(1 for x in results if x.get('success'))
            bad = [x for x in results if not x.get('success')]
            fail += len(bad); failures.extend(bad[:10])
            print('chunk result sample', results[:3])
        else:
            ok += len(part)
        processed += len(part)
        print('sent chunk', i//200+1, 'size', len(part), 'cum ok/fail', ok, fail)
    except Exception as e:
        print('enterprise chunk exception', i, type(e).__name__, e)
        fail += len(part); processed += len(part)
print('enterprise processed', processed, 'ok', ok, 'fail', fail, 'sample_failures', failures[:5])

content = ("Rachel, you're right: silence is unacceptable. Active S2 tickets now have named owners and daily updates; "
           "stale export/integration bugs are being reopened, and finance-output QA is live. Send the ticket ID and I'll escalate today.")
print('social len', len(content))
try:
    pprint(nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=content, reply_to_post_id=1695))
except Exception as e:
    print('social post failed', type(e).__name__, e)

print('\nremaining latest non-agent')
remaining = nm.query("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT t.sender, c.group_id, t.day, COUNT(*) n, SUM(t.seat_count) seats
FROM enterprise_turns t JOIN latest l ON t.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE t.sender!='agent'
GROUP BY t.sender,c.group_id,t.day ORDER BY t.day DESC,c.group_id
""")['rows']
print(remaining)
print('\nlatest agent offers day469 summary')
for r in nm.query("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT c.group_id,t.day,COUNT(*) n,SUM(t.seat_count) agent_seat_field,substr(t.offer_json,1,180) offer
FROM enterprise_turns t JOIN latest l ON t.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE t.sender='agent' AND t.day=469
GROUP BY c.group_id,t.day,substr(t.offer_json,1,120)
ORDER BY c.group_id
""")['rows']:
    print(r)

import json, math, statistics
import novamind_api as nm

def q(sql):
    r=nm.query(sql)
    return r.get('rows', [])

def show(title, rows, maxrows=20):
    print('\n###', title)
    if not rows:
        print('(none)'); return
    for row in rows[:maxrows]:
        print(row)
    if len(rows)>maxrows: print(f'... {len(rows)-maxrows} more')

print('current_day', nm.vars.current_day)
# ledger summary
show('ledger by category last 7d', q("""
SELECT category, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amount
FROM ledger WHERE day>=(SELECT MAX(day) FROM ledger)-6 GROUP BY category ORDER BY amount DESC
"""))
show('ledger daily last 14d net/sub/cost', q("""
SELECT day, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) net,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category='subscription_payment' THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) subs,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category='compute' THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) compute,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category='capacity' THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) capacity,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category='advertising' THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) ads,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category='operations' THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) ops,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category='development' THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) dev,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category='lead_acquisition_cost' THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) leadcost
FROM ledger WHERE day>=456 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
"""), maxrows=30)
# config current/history
show('config last 10 days', q("""
SELECT * FROM config_history WHERE day>=456 ORDER BY day
"""), maxrows=20)
show('latest config overrides each type', q("""
SELECT setting_type, day, tool_name, substr(settings_json,1,500) settings FROM config_overrides co
WHERE id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM config_overrides GROUP BY setting_type)
ORDER BY setting_type
"""), maxrows=20)
# subscriptions
show('subscription statuses', q("SELECT status, COUNT(*) n FROM subscriptions GROUP BY status"))
show('active subs by group/plan/effective/promo/source', q("""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, ROUND(s.effective_price,2) price, ROUND(s.promotion,2) promo, c.acquisition_source source,
 COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan, ROUND(s.effective_price,2), ROUND(s.promotion,2), c.acquisition_source
ORDER BY mrr DESC
"""), maxrows=50)
show('active subs total by mod next 35d', q("""
SELECT ((billing_day_mod30-469)%30+30)%30 days_until, billing_day_mod30 mod,
 COUNT(*) subs, ROUND(SUM(effective_price*seat_count),2) mrr
FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed'
GROUP BY days_until, mod ORDER BY days_until LIMIT 35
"""), maxrows=35)
show('active subs by start_week', q("""
SELECT (start_day/7)*7 start_week, MIN(start_day) min_day, MAX(start_day) max_day, COUNT(*) subs,
 ROUND(SUM(effective_price*seat_count),2) mrr
FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed'
GROUP BY start_week ORDER BY start_week DESC LIMIT 20
"""), maxrows=25)
show('cancellations last 21d by start/mod/plan/price', q("""
SELECT end_day, start_day, billing_day_mod30 mod, plan, ROUND(effective_price,2) price, ROUND(promotion,2) promo, COUNT(*) n,
 ROUND(SUM(effective_price*seat_count),2) lost_mrr
FROM subscriptions WHERE status='cancelled' AND end_day>=448
GROUP BY end_day, start_day, mod, plan, ROUND(effective_price,2), ROUND(promotion,2)
ORDER BY end_day DESC, n DESC LIMIT 80
"""), maxrows=80)
# lead cohorts last week
show('new subs by created_day/source/plan/price last 14d', q("""
SELECT c.created_day, c.acquisition_source source, s.plan, ROUND(s.effective_price,2) price, COUNT(*) subs,
 ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) init_mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.start_day>=456 AND s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.created_day, c.acquisition_source, s.plan, ROUND(s.effective_price,2)
ORDER BY c.created_day DESC, source, subs DESC
"""), maxrows=120)
show('new/lost small customers by created_day/status/source', q("""
SELECT c.created_day, c.acquisition_source source, s.status, COUNT(*) n
FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='small' AND c.created_day>=456
GROUP BY c.created_day, source, s.status ORDER BY c.created_day DESC, source, s.status
"""), maxrows=160)
# ads history
show('ad channel leads last 21d', q("""
SELECT day, channel_id, group_id, ROUND(SUM(spend),2) spend, SUM(leads_generated) leads,
 CASE WHEN SUM(leads_generated)>0 THEN ROUND(SUM(spend)*1.0/SUM(leads_generated),2) ELSE NULL END cpl
FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day>=448 GROUP BY day, channel_id, group_id ORDER BY day DESC, spend DESC
"""), maxrows=100)
show('ad channel weekly last 8w', q("""
SELECT (day/7)*7 week, channel_id, group_id, ROUND(SUM(spend),2) spend, SUM(leads_generated) leads,
 ROUND(SUM(spend)*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(leads_generated),0),2) cpl
FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day>=413 GROUP BY week, channel_id, group_id ORDER BY week DESC, spend DESC
"""), maxrows=100)
# issues, service
show('open issues by group/status age', q("""
SELECT group_id, days_open, COUNT(*) n FROM issues WHERE status='open' GROUP BY group_id, days_open ORDER BY group_id, days_open
"""), maxrows=100)
show('issues resolved last week age', q("""
SELECT group_id, resolved_day, days_open, COUNT(*) n FROM issues WHERE status='resolved' AND resolved_day>=463 GROUP BY group_id, resolved_day, days_open ORDER BY resolved_day DESC, days_open
"""), maxrows=80)
show('service day last 21', q("""
SELECT day,total_usage_units,p95_ms,error_rate,downtime_minutes,capacity_tier,capacity_units FROM service_day WHERE day>=448 ORDER BY day
"""), maxrows=30)
# enterprise summaries
show('active enterprise subs', q("""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, ROUND(s.effective_price,2) price, COUNT(*) contracts, SUM(s.seat_count) seats,
 ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='large'
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan, ROUND(s.effective_price,2)
ORDER BY seats DESC
"""), maxrows=50)
show('latest enterprise turn by customer (nonclosed/open-ish)', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT t.customer_id,t.message_id,t.thread_type,t.turn_number,t.sender,t.day,t.seat_count,t.closed,t.close_reason,c.group_id,c.company_primary_concern,c.company_size_descriptor,substr(t.message_text,1,160) msg,substr(t.offer_json,1,200) offer
FROM enterprise_turns t JOIN latest l ON t.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
ORDER BY t.day DESC, t.sender, t.seat_count DESC LIMIT 500
"""), maxrows=80)
show('latest non-agent enterprise rows needing action?', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT c.group_id,t.thread_type,t.turn_number,t.sender,t.day,COUNT(*) leads,SUM(t.seat_count) seats,MIN(t.seat_count) min_seats,MAX(t.seat_count) max_seats
FROM enterprise_turns t JOIN latest l ON t.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE t.sender!='agent'
GROUP BY c.group_id,t.thread_type,t.turn_number,t.sender,t.day ORDER BY t.day DESC,seats DESC
"""), maxrows=100)
show('latest agent pending offers summary', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT c.group_id,t.day,t.thread_type,t.turn_number,COUNT(*) n,SUM(t.seat_count) agent_seat_field,substr(t.offer_json,1,200) offer_sample
FROM enterprise_turns t JOIN latest l ON t.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE t.sender='agent'
GROUP BY c.group_id,t.day,t.thread_type,t.turn_number,substr(t.offer_json,1,80) ORDER BY t.day DESC,n DESC LIMIT 100
"""), maxrows=100)
show('enterprise accepted/rejected closed last 30', q("""
SELECT t.day,t.close_reason,c.group_id,t.thread_type,COUNT(*) n,SUM(t.seat_count) seats,substr(t.offer_json,1,120) offer
FROM enterprise_turns t JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE t.closed=1 AND t.day>=439 GROUP BY t.day,t.close_reason,c.group_id,t.thread_type,substr(t.offer_json,1,80)
ORDER BY t.day DESC,n DESC LIMIT 100
"""), maxrows=100)
